description: One bucket assignment per accepted rule from this iteration. Every rule you were given appears exactly once.

id.description: The rule id, copied verbatim from the input.

bucket.description: promote = lands in project root and binds future iterations; iteration_only = stays in the iteration file.

reason.description: One short sentence explaining the bucket choice.

classifications.reason: Cross-role error response shape — applies to every future API endpoint.
Class-merging via cn() helper is a durable styling pattern across all future frontend work.
Refresh-token rotation strategy specific to this iteration's auth scaffold; future iterations may revisit.
